# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User wants bilingual support for room status: accept both Indonesian (Tersedia, Penuh, Perbaikan/Maintenance) and English (Available, Full, Maintenance) in status filters and modal edit forms for seamless API integration.
- Do not alter or modify the existing UI layout and design. Any code changes must be minimal and focus solely on fixing functionality or errors without affecting the visual design and properties of UI controls such as Location, Size, color, font, and styling.
